Self.Wiki: Defines parameters relating to the player and humanoid characters.

loadWeightRateMin.Wiki: The minimum weight ratio for worn equipment to be considered 'medium armor'.

loadWeightRateMax.Wiki: The maximum weight ratio for worn equipment to be considered 'medium armor'.

tireKeepTime.Wiki: The duration after stamina has been exhausted before it will start to recover.

staminaCostDash.Wiki: The base stamina consumption cost when dashing.

staminaCostLockOnDash.Wiki: The base stamina consumption cost when dashing and locked-on to a target.

staminaCostLadder.Wiki: The base stamina consumption cost when dashing up a ladder.

staminaCostRope.Wiki: The base stamina consumption cost when sliding down a rope.

staminaCostEvasionBase.Wiki: The base stamina consumption cost when doing an evasive action.

staminaCostStep.Wiki: The base stamina consumption cost when doing a backstep.

staminaCostRolling.Wiki: The base stamina consumption cost when doing a roll.

staminaCostDashJump.Wiki: The base stamina consumption cost when doing a dashing jump.

staminaCostStandJump.Wiki: The base stamina consumption cost when doing a standing jump.

staminaCostRateEvasion.Wiki: The stamina consumption rate when doing an evasive action.

staminaCostRateAttack.Wiki: The stamina consumption rate when doing an attack action.

moveDemeritPercentMin.Wiki: The minimum rate of movement disadvantage duing stamina decreases.

moveDemeritPercentMax.Wiki: The maximum rate of movement disadvantage duing stamina decreases.

equipDemeritPercentMin.Wiki: The minimum rate of equipment disadvantage duing stamina decreases.

equipDemeritPercentMax.Wiki: The maximum rate of equipment disadvantage duing stamina decreases.

attackDemeritPercentMin.Wiki: The minimum rate of attack disadvantage duing stamina decreases.

attackDemeritPercentMax.Wiki: The maximum rate of attack disadvantage duing stamina decreases.

attackExtraLackOfStatsRate.Wiki: The insufficiency rate of attack status when insufficient stamina is present for an attack cost.

rollingExtraLackOfStatsRate.Wiki: When insufficiency rate of rolling status when insufficient stamina is present for a roll cost.

attackKeepEmptyStaminaTime.Wiki: If an attack exhausts all stamina, this is the duration (in seconds) that the stamina bar is kept empty.

emptyStaminaAttackExtraLackOfStatsRate.Wiki: When insufficiency rate of attack status when stamina is exhausted due to an attack cost.

shotReserveSpeed.Wiki: The attack preparation regeneration rate when stamina is exhausted due to an attack cost.

attackWaitSpeed.Wiki: The attack standby regeneration rate when stamina is exhausted due to an attack cost.

armorType.Wiki: The armor type of the character.

damageWeaponType.Wiki: The damage weapon type of the character.

deadRagdollFitGround.Wiki: If enabled, the character's ragdoll will follow the ground upon death.

deadTimerA.Wiki: The elapsed time for the death timer (a).

dyingHpMax.Wiki: The maximum value considered in the low HP theshold.

dyingHpMin.Wiki: The minimum value considered in the low HP theshold.

dyingMoveBlendMaxRate.Wiki: The movement blend rate when dying.

ctrlType.Wiki: The control type of the character.

collisionType.Wiki: The movement collision type of the character.

fHitHeight.Wiki: The height (in metres) of the collision capsule during movement.

fHitRadius.Wiki: The radius (in metres) of the collision capsule during movement.

fChrHeight.Wiki: The height (in metres) of the collision capsule for the character.

fGuardAngleY.Wiki: The angle (in degrees) of the guard cone on the vertical axis.

fGuardAngleX.Wiki: The angle (in degrees) of the guard cone on the horizontal axis.

fMaxLinearVelocity.Wiki: The maximum linear velocity (in metres per second) this character can move at.

loadGravityRateBaseMin.Wiki: The minimum weight (in kilograms) used in the gravity rate calculation.

loadGravityRateBaseMax.Wiki: The maximum weight (in kilograms) used in the gravity rate calculation.

gravityFactorMin.Wiki: The minimum value for gravity acceleration.

gravityFactorMax.Wiki: The maximum value for gravity acceleration.

gravitySpeedMax.Wiki: The maximum speed gravity can reach when applied to a character.

flyCtrlValue.Wiki: The braking rate of the character when moving with flight.

lockPointType.Wiki: The lock point type of the character.

lockCameraCategory.Wiki: The correction category used for the lock-on camera for a character.

lockDisableRadius.Wiki: The radius (in metres) within which the lock camera is disabled.

lockDisableHeight.Wiki: The height (in metres) within which the lock camera is disabled.

guardKnockBackRateSuperSmall.Wiki: The guard knockback reduction rate applied when the attacker is considered 'Very Small'.

guardKnockBackRateSmall.Wiki: The guard knockback reduction rate applied when the attacker is considered 'Small'.

guardKnockBackRateMedium.Wiki: The guard knockback reduction rate applied when the attacker is considered 'Medium'.

guardKnockBackRateLarge.Wiki: The guard knockback reduction rate applied when the attacker is considered 'Large'.

guardKnockBackRateSuperLarge.Wiki: The guard knockback reduction rate applied when the attacker is considered 'Very Large'.

guardKnockBackRateUltraLarge.Wiki: The guard knockback reduction rate applied when the attacker is considered 'Immensely Large'.

guardKnockBackRateFlip.Wiki: The guard knockback reduction rate applied during a deflection.

headShotEnable.Wiki: If enabled, a character can be head shot.

guardBreakEnable.Wiki: If enabled, a character can be guard broken.

backStabEnable.Wiki: If enabled, a character can be backstabbed.

parryBreakStabEnable.Wiki: If enabled, a character can be riposted after a parry break.

parryBreakDefenselessTime.Wiki: The riposte vulnerability duration (in seconds) after a parry break.

parryBreakShorteningTime.Wiki: The input time reduction (in seconds) after a parry break.

guardBreakStabEnable.Wiki: If enabled, a character can be riposted after a guard break.

downAttackLength.Wiki: The allowable distance (in metres) for a down follow-up attack.

backStabSideAngle.Wiki: The horizontal cone angle (in degrees) between the attacker and victim that a backstab can occur in.

backStabUpSideAngle.Wiki: The vertical cone angle (in degrees) between the attacker and victim that a backstab can occur in.

backStabHeight.Wiki: The allowable height difference (in metres) between the attacker and victim for a backstab to occur.

backStabLength.Wiki: The allowable distance (in metres) between the attacker and victim for a backstab to occur.

parryBreakStabSideAngle.Wiki: The horizontal cone angle (in degrees) between the attacker and victim that a parry riposte can occur in.

parryBreakStabUpSideAngle.Wiki: The vertical cone angle (in degrees) between the attacker and victim that a parry riposte can occur in.

parryBreakStabHeight.Wiki: The allowable height difference (in metres) between the attacker and victim for a parry riposte to occur.

parryStabLength.Wiki: The allowable distance (in metres) between the attacker and victim for a parry riposte to occur.

guardBreakStabSideAngle.Wiki: The horizontal cone angle (in degrees) between the attacker and victim that a guard break riposte can occur in.

guardBreakStabUpSideAngle.Wiki: The vertical cone angle (in degrees) between the attacker and victim that a guard break riposte can occur in.

guardBreakStabHeight.Wiki: The allowable height difference (in metres) between the attacker and victim for a guard break riposte to occur.

guardBreakStabLength.Wiki: The allowable distance (in metres) between the attacker and victim for a guard break riposte to occur.

lowerEnable.Wiki: If enabled, lower body damage can occur.

lowerDmgBendingValue.Wiki: The amount of crouching that occurs when lower body damage occurs.

lowerDmgBendingStartTime.Wiki: The duration (in seconds) of the crouching that occurs when lower body damage occurs.

lowerDmgBendingEndTime.AltName: Lower Body Damage: Crouch Recovery Time
lowerDmgBendingEndTime.Wiki: The duration (in seconds) of the crouch recovery that occurs when lower body damage occurs.

lowerDmgMoveDecelerationRate.Wiki: The amount of movement speed reduction that occurs when lower body damage occurs.

lowerDmgRotateDecelerationRate.Wiki: The amount of rotation speed reduction that occurs when lower body damage occurs.

ragdollMassFactor.Wiki: The mass multiplier to apply to the character's ragdoll.

ragdollFrictionFactor.Wiki: The friction coefficient multiplier to apply to the character's ragdoll.

ragdollRestitutionFactor.Wiki: The restitution coefficient multiplier to apply to the character's ragdoll.

ragdollMaxLinearVelocityFactor.Wiki: The maximum speed multiplier to apply to the character's ragdoll.

ragdollMaxAngularVelocityFactor.Wiki: The maximum angular velocity multiplier to apply to the character's ragdoll.

ragdollGravityFactorMin.Wiki: The minimum acceleration gravity can apply to the character's ragdoll.

ragdollGravityFactorMax.Wiki: The maximum acceleration gravity can apply to the character's ragdoll.

jumpAttackSideAngle.Wiki: The horizontal angle (in degrees) for jump attack collision.

damageRotationSpeed.Wiki: The turning speed (in degrees per second) in the direction of damage that occurs.

damageMoveDistRate.Wiki: The knockback reduction rate when damage occurs.

heavyDamageKnockBackDist.Wiki: The knockback reduction rate when heavy damage occurs.

heavyDamageStiff.Wiki: The recovery time (in seconds) when heavy damage occurs.

heavyDamageDefenselessTime.Wiki: The vulnerability time (in seconds) when heavy damage occurs.

bleedingDamageStiff.Wiki: The recovery time (in seconds) when bleed damage occurs.

heavyDamageShorteningTime.Wiki: The input reduction time (in seconds) when heavy damage occurs.

guardBreakDamageDefenselessTime.Wiki: The vulnerability time (in seconds) when a guard break occurs.

guardBreakDamageShorteningTime.Wiki: The input reduction time (in seconds) when a guard break occurs.

blowDecelerationTimeFirst.Wiki: The deceleration time (in seconds) when blowback damage occurs.

blowDecelerationTimeSecond.Wiki: The deceleration time (in seconds) when blowback damage occurs.

blowDecelerationFirst.Wiki: The deceleration (in metres per seconds squared) when blowback damage occurs.

blowDecelerationSecond.Wiki: The deceleration (in metres per seconds squared) when blowback damage occurs.

parryRotationSpeed.Wiki: The speed of turning during a parry (in degrees per second).

BreathDamageEnable.Wiki: If enabled, breath damage can occur.

hitLowerBodyHeight.Wiki: The lower body height for hit judgements.

hitFrontAngle.Wiki: The front (horizontal) angle used for hit judgements.

attackMoveSpeed.Wiki: The movement speed of walk attacks (in metres per second).

attackRotationSpeed.Wiki: The turn speed of walk attacks (in degrees per second).

attackRange.Wiki: The range of walk attacks (in metres).

fLookAtRotationLeftMax.Wiki: The left rotation limit (in degrees) when focusing a target.

fLookAtRotationRightMax.Wiki: The right rotation limit (in degrees) when focusing a target.

fLookAtRotationUpperMax.Wiki: The upper rotation limit (in degrees) when focusing a target.

fLookAtRotationLownerMax.Wiki: The lower rotation limit (in degrees) when focusing a target.

fLookAtVisibilitySideMax.Wiki: The horizontal rotation limit (in degrees) when focusing a target.

fLookAtVisibilityUpperMax.Wiki: The vertical rotation limit (in degrees) when focusing a target.
